issues.message:
TS2322: Type 'string[]' is not assignable to type 'Iterable<object>'.
  The types returned by '[Symbol.iterator]().next(...)' are incompatible between these types.
    Type 'IteratorResult<string, undefined>' is not assignable to type 'IteratorResult<object, any>'.
      Type 'IteratorYieldResult<string>' is not assignable to type 'IteratorResult<object, any>'.
        Type 'IteratorYieldResult<string>' is not assignable to type 'IteratorYieldResult<object>'.
          Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'object'.
issues.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript error reported by the compiler. The exact location is included in the issue location field.

issues.message:
TS2322: Type 'Dispatch<SetStateAction<string>>' is not assignable to type '(key: Key) => void'.
  Types of parameters 'value' and 'key' are incompatible.
    Type 'Key' is not assignable to type 'SetStateAction<string>'.
      Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'SetStateAction<string>'.
issues.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript error reported by the compiler. The exact location is included in the issue location field.

issues.message: <Autocomplete> is used without any of its sub-components.
<Inline> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Inline>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.
